onlyInPassA.key: contract|travel.Trip|specification|requires|trainTypeName, startStationName, terminalStationName, startTime, endTime are @NotNull while routeId and stationsName are not
contract|travelplan.TransferTravelInfo|specification|shapedAs|fields startStation, viaStation, endStation, travelDate, trainType as JSON request body for /travelPlan/transferResult
effect|travel.InitData|effect|callsProvider|invokes travelService.create for five hardcoded trips on application startup via CommandLineRunner

semantic|travel.TravelServiceImpl|semantic|meansInUse|application.yml declares train-service, order-service, route-service, basic-service and seat-service base URL properties, but call sites build provider URLs via getServiceUrl(serviceName) string concatenation on the literal service name rather than reading those properties

semantic|travel.TravelServiceImpl|semantic|meansInUse|ts-basic-service response status 0 selects the no-travel-result-data branch, causing an empty list or null return without a separate content check

semantic|travel.Trip|semantic|identifiedBy|startStationName, stationsName and terminalStationName are normalized to lowercase at trip-creation site via StringUtils.String2Lower, while trainTypeName is stored as-is
state|travel.TripRepository|state|transitionsTo|trip row removed for the given TripId
state|travel.Trip|state|persistsIn|relational row via JPA @Entity with jpa-uuid generated id column length 36

onlyInPassB.key: authority|travel.config.SecurityConfig|authority|allowsCrossOrigin|WebMvcConfigurer CorsRegistry mapping /** to allowedOrigins=ALL, allowedMethods=ALL, allowedHeaders=ALL, allowCredentials=false

authority|travel.controller.TravelController|authority|allowsCrossOrigin|method-level @CrossOrigin(origins="*") on createTrip/retrieve/updateTrip/deleteTrip/queryInfo/queryInfoInparallel/getTripAllDetailInfo/queryAll/adminQueryAll, including the two endpoints SecurityConfig gates with requiresRole ADMIN
contract|travel.repository.TripRepository|specification|shapedAs|CrudRepository<Trip,TripId> plus findByTripId/deleteByTripId/findByRouteId lookups keyed by embedded TripId or routeId
effect|travel.init.InitData|effect|callsProvider|travel.service.TravelService.create invoked five times on CommandLineRunner startup
